assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 18-29: '## Code Intelligence' heading present with line 20 stating 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' and a concrete example using mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31: '### Limitations' subheading present directly under the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18), with content 'No limitations known -- no Serena instance limitations reported.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 5-8 under '### Serena Instances Discovered': '1. **serena_backend** -- identified from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_backend__`' and '2. **serena_ui** -- identified from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_ui__`'. Source heading on line 3 confirms 'Source: MCP Tool Listing (mcp-tools-with-serena.md)'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 10: 'All subsections below are entirely new (greenfield -- no prior Project Configuration existed).' Each subsection is explicitly marked '(new)': '## Repository Registry (new)' (line 13), '## Jira Configuration (new)' (line 21), '## Code Intelligence (new)' (line 32). The Preserved Content section (lines 3-5) notes that existing non-Project-Configuration content was preserved and the Project Configuration section was appended fresh.
